hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; [ "$branch" = "master" ] && echo 'On master — cut a branch before editing (see CLAUDE.md branch/PR workflow)' >&2 && exit 2; exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | xargs -r vp fmt > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$branch" ]; then echo '{}'; exit 0; fi; pr_state=$(gh pr view --json state 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.state // "none"' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$pr_state" ] && pr_state='none'; ctx="Branch: $branch | PR: $pr_state"; jq -n --arg ctx "$ctx" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: $ctx}}'
